heading: CONTACT
submitMusicDescription: Are you an artist or band looking to get your music heard? Submit your demos and releases directly via SubmitHub.
messagePlaceholder: How can we help you? (min. 20 characters)
gdprConsent: I agree to the processing of my personal data to handle this inquiry (GDPR Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b).
spamDisclaimer: This form uses a technical protection field for spam detection.
successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.
errorMessage: Failed to send your message. Please try again or email us directly.
validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validationMessage: Message must be at least 20 characters.
validationConsent: You must agree to the data processing to submit this form.
